# ADR 002: cosmos-sdk-style filename

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

Filename convention `adr-002-cosmos-style.md` — letters, hyphen, digits, hyphen, slug. Found running duckadrift's R5 calibration corpus against cosmos-sdk.

## Decision

Recognize this as ADR number 2.

## Consequences

None — fixture file for filename-convention parsing, not a Tier 0 check.
